pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage introducing the kennel and providing quick access to puppies, litters, studs, tours, events, shows, and the shop.
primary_functions: Highlight featured available puppies, planned litters, stud dogs, upcoming shows, and events
Provide clear calls-to-action to key sections: Available Puppies, Planned Litters, Stud Dogs, Visits & Tours, Events, Show Schedule, and Shop
Summarize kennel’s breeding focus, health testing, and show achievements with links to About and Contact pages

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'View Available Puppies' call-to-action
Click on 'View Planned Litters' call-to-action
Click on a featured puppy card
Click on a featured planned litter card
Click on 'Stud Dogs' teaser or navigation item

params.studDogId: id of clicked featured stud dog

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a featured stud dog card
Click on 'Visits & Tours' teaser
Click on 'Handling Workshops' teaser
Click on 'Show Schedule' teaser
Click on an upcoming event/show card
Click on 'Shop' teaser or promotion
Click on 'Learn more about our kennel'
Click on 'Contact Us' link in hero/footer

access_methods.description: Main navigation 'Home' link
Clicking the kennel logo returns to the homepage

pages.name: Puppies & Planned Litters
pages.description: Listing page for both available puppies and planned/upcoming litters, controlled via a view mode (e.g., Available Puppies vs Planned Litters).
primary_functions: Allow users to switch between viewing available puppies and planned litters (e.g., via view=available or view=planned_litters)
Provide filters for puppies such as sex, price range, availability date, puppy type/placement (pet vs show prospect), and sire titles
Provide filters for planned litters such as parent health testing (e.g., both fully health tested) and expected colors
Offer sorting options for listings (e.g., price low to high, age, availability date)
Display searchable, filterable cards for each puppy or planned litter with key information and links to the detail page

incoming_params.description: Determines whether to show 'available' puppies or 'planned_litters'; used by header/footer links
Filter for puppy sex: 'male', 'female', or 'either'
Minimum puppy price to filter by
Maximum puppy price to filter by
Start of availability date range (ISO date string)
End of availability date range (ISO date string)
Puppy placement type filter: 'pet_companion', 'show_prospect', etc.
Minimum sire title filter: 'none', 'ch', 'gch', or 'bis'
Expected color filter for planned litters (e.g., 'black and tan')
When 'true', shows only planned litters where both parents are fully health tested
Sorting mode, e.g., 'price_low_to_high', 'availability_date', or 'age'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an available puppy card in 'Available Puppies' view
Click on a planned litter card in 'Planned Litters' view
Click 'Have a question about puppies?' link

access_methods.description: Header 'Available Puppies' and 'Planned Litters' links (with view query parameter)
Footer 'Available Puppies' and 'Planned Litters' links
Accessible via direct URL with filters and sorting parameters

pages.name: Puppy / Litter Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific available puppy or planned litter, including all relevant information and action forms.
primary_functions: Display full details for a selected puppy or planned litter, including photos, pedigree summary, health information, expected or actual availability date, and pricing
Show a clearly visible puppy or litter ID/reference number for use in inquiries (e.g., PUP-103)
For available puppies, provide a 'Reserve Puppy' flow including options such as hold durations (e.g., 'Hold for 7 days') and a reservation request submission
For planned litters, provide a 'Join Waitlist' flow with fields for preferred sex, placement type (pet/companion vs show prospect), budget, contact info, and preference notes
Link back to the main Puppies & Planned Litters listings and suggest related puppies or litters

incoming_params.description: Specifies whether the detail view is for a 'puppy' or a 'litter'
Puppy ID for detail view when kind='puppy'
Litter ID for detail view when kind='litter'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Available Puppies' when viewing a puppy
Click 'Back to Planned Litters' when viewing a litter
Click 'Ask about this puppy' when viewing a puppy

access_methods.description: Accessed via links from listings or featured sections with kind and ID parameters

pages.name: Stud Dogs
pages.description: Listing and comparison page for kennel stud dogs available for breeding services.
primary_functions: List all available stud dogs with thumbnail photos, key titles, health testing summaries, and stud fees
Provide filters for stud fee (including a maximum fee), health testing (e.g., hip score A, DNA clear), and other attributes (e.g., titles, color, size)
Allow selection of multiple studs (e.g., first three results) for side-by-side comparison within the same page
Display a comparison view/table (via a section or overlay) summarizing titles, health tests, stud fee, and notable offspring for the selected studs
Provide links from each stud dog card or comparison table entry to the Stud Dog Detail page

incoming_params.description: Minimum stud fee filter
Maximum stud fee filter
Hip score filter, e.g., 'a', 'b', 'c', or 'any'
DNA status filter, e.g., 'clear', 'carrier', 'any'
Sorting mode, e.g., 'stud_fee_low_to_high' or 'title_count_high_to_low'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a stud dog card

params.studDogId: id of row clicked in comparison table

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on stud name or image in comparison table
Click general 'Contact us about stud services' link

access_methods.description: Header 'Stud Dogs' link
Footer 'Stud Dogs' link
Links from Home or About sections into filtered stud listings
Accessible with pre-applied filters via query parameters

pages.name: Stud Dog Detail
pages.description: Detailed profile page for a single stud dog, focused on breeding information and contact.
primary_functions: Present detailed information about the stud dog including full list of titles (CH, GCH, BIS, etc.), pedigree, photos, health clearances, and stud fee
Highlight total number of titles so users can easily identify stud dogs with the most achievements
Provide a 'Breeding Inquiry' or 'Request Stud Service' form where users can enter kennel name, email, desired breeding timeframe, and a custom message
Offer quick access back to the Stud Dogs listing or other studs for further comparison

incoming_params.description: ID of the stud dog to display

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Stud Dogs'
Click on a related stud dog card

access_methods.description: Accessed via studDogId parameter from the Stud Dogs listing or featured studs

pages.name: Visits & Tours
pages.description: Information and booking page for kennel visits and tours.
primary_functions: Explain tour options, policies, and what visitors can expect during a kennel visit
Offer a 'Book a Tour' section with a form to select tour type (e.g., Standard Kennel Tour), group size, preferred date, and time slot
Provide a date picker and time-of-day options (e.g., Afternoon 1 PM–4 PM) with available time slots displayed and selectable
Collect visitor contact information (name, email, phone) and submit a tour booking/visit request
Confirm submitted booking details on-screen after form submission

incoming_params.description: Preselected tour type, e.g., 'standard_kennel_tour'
Preselected date for the tour (ISO date string)
Preselected time of day filter: 'morning', 'afternoon', or 'evening'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Questions about visits? Contact us' link

access_methods.description: Header 'Visits & Tours' link
Footer 'Visits & Tours' link
Links from Home page or other sections into the booking form

pages.name: Events & Shows
pages.description: Unified listing page for handling workshops, classes, and dog shows, including a view for the user’s tracked shows.
primary_functions: List upcoming handling workshops, classes, and shows with basic details (date, time, location, type, price or entry info)

Provide filters for event type (e.g., Handling Workshop), date range (including next 3 months), location by ZIP code and distance radius, and kennel participation (e.g., shows where our dogs are entered)
Allow sorting of events by criteria such as price (low to high), date soonest, or distance
Support different views or modes: workshops-focused (e.g., category=workshops), shows-focused (e.g., category=shows), and a watchlist/Tracked Shows view (e.g., view=watchlist)
Link each listed workshop or show to its corresponding Event / Show Detail page

incoming_params.description: Determines whether to focus on 'workshops' or 'shows'
'list' for normal listings or 'watchlist' for the tracked shows view
Event type filter, e.g., 'handling_workshop', 'dog_show', or 'any'
Start of date range filter (ISO date string)
End of date range filter (ISO date string)
ZIP code for distance filtering
Maximum distance in miles from the provided ZIP code
If true, filter to shows where kennel dogs are entered
Sorting mode: 'price_low_to_high', 'date_soonest', 'distance', etc.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an event/show card in the list
Click on 'My Tracked Shows' within the page

access_methods.description: Header 'Events & Workshops', 'Show Schedule', and 'Tracked Shows' all resolve to this page with different query parameters
Footer 'Events & Workshops' and 'Show Schedule' links
Accessible via URL parameters for category, filters, or watchlist view

pages.name: Event / Show Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a single handling workshop/class or dog show, with appropriate actions depending on event type.
primary_functions: Display full details for a selected workshop or show, including schedule, location map/description, requirements, and pricing or entry fees

For handling workshops or classes, provide a registration form collecting participant count, participant name(s), contact email, and payment method (including options like Pay at Check-In or Pay Later when available)
For dog shows, provide an 'Add to Watchlist' or 'Track This Show' button to add or remove the show from the user’s tracked shows list
Confirm workshop registration or watchlist updates on-screen after the user submits the relevant action
Link back to the Events & Shows listing (workshops or show schedule) and to the Tracked Shows view

incoming_params.description: ID of the event or show to display

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Events & Workshops' from a workshop-type event
Click 'Back to Show Schedule' from a dog show event
Click 'View My Tracked Shows' after adding a show to the watchlist

access_methods.description: Accessed with eventId parameter from Events & Shows listing or homepage featured events

pages.name: Shop / Store
pages.description: Storefront and product listing page for kennel merchandise and accessories, including apparel and leashes.
primary_functions: Display main product categories (e.g., Apparel/Clothing, Collars & Leashes) and allow users to switch categories (e.g., category_id=apparel, category_id=leashes)
Within a category, list products with thumbnails, names, prices, ratings, and key labels such as 'Free Shipping'
Provide search and filters within the category, such as keyword search (e.g., 'logo t-shirt'), price range (e.g., max $30), minimum rating (e.g., 4.5+ stars), and free shipping options
Allow users to click through to a Product Detail page for more information and purchase options
Display a mini-cart or cart icon with item count and link to the Cart page

incoming_params.description: Category slug to view, e.g., 'apparel' or 'leashes'
Keyword for searching within the selected category
Minimum price filter
Maximum price filter
Minimum product rating filter, e.g., 4.5
If true, filter to products with free shipping
Sorting mode, e.g., 'price_low_to_high' or 'rating_high_to_low'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product card
Click on cart icon or 'View Cart' link in mini-cart

access_methods.description: Header 'Shop' link
Footer 'Shop' link
Accessed with category and filter parameters for deep-linking into categories

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed page for a single shop product, such as a logo t-shirt or leash, with purchasing options.
primary_functions: Show detailed information about the product including photos, description, available sizes or colors, price, rating, and shipping details
Allow users to select options (e.g., size Medium for a logo t-shirt) and quantity for purchase
Provide an 'Add to Cart' button to add the configured product to the shopping cart
Suggest related products (e.g., matching leashes or other apparel) to encourage additional purchases
Provide navigation back to the relevant Shop category listing

incoming_params.description: ID of the product to display

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to category' link
Click on a related product card
Click on 'View Cart' after adding item or via cart icon

access_methods.description: Accessed with productId parameter from Shop listing or promotions

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping cart page showing items the user plans to purchase and allowing final adjustments before checkout.
primary_functions: Display a list of all items added to the cart, including product name, options (e.g., size), quantity, individual price, and subtotal
Allow users to update quantities or remove items from the cart
Show order summary including subtotal, estimated shipping (if applicable), and total cost
Provide a clear 'Proceed to Checkout' button that takes the user to the Checkout page
Offer a link back to the Shop to continue browsing and adding items

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Proceed to Checkout' button
Click 'Continue Shopping' link

access_methods.description: Cart icon or 'Cart' link accessible from the header/mini-cart
Redirect from Product Detail or Shop pages after 'View Cart'

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Page for finalizing store purchases with shipping, contact, and payment details.
primary_functions: Collect buyer contact information and shipping details necessary to fulfill the order
Present available payment options, including non-external options such as 'Pay at Pickup' or 'Pay at Check-In/Pay Later' where appropriate
Display an order review section summarizing items, quantities, and final total before confirmation
Allow the user to submit and confirm the order, showing a success/confirmation message upon completion

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Return to Home' after successful order confirmation
Click 'Back to Shop' from checkout page

access_methods.description: Reached after clicking 'Proceed to Checkout' from the Cart page
Direct access via saved URL if a cart exists

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: General contact page with a form allowing visitors to send questions or inquiries, including puppy availability questions.
primary_functions: Provide a contact form with fields for name, email, phone number, subject (e.g., Puppy Availability, General Question, Stud Inquiry), and message
Allow users to reference a specific puppy, litter, or stud in their message (e.g., by including a noted puppy ID)
Offer a 'preferred contact method' option (e.g., email or phone) for follow-up
Display basic kennel contact details such as physical location (city/region), email, and phone number
Confirm successful form submission with an on-page message

incoming_params.description: Preselected subject for the contact form, e.g., 'puppy_availability', 'stud_inquiry'
ID of the puppy referenced in a puppy availability question
Desired pickup date for the puppy (ISO date string), prefilled from links if provided

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Home' link after viewing confirmation

access_methods.description: Header 'Contact' link
Footer 'Contact' link
Accessible with preselected subject and related puppy id from detail pages

pages.name: About
pages.description: Informational page about the kennel, breeding philosophy, health practices, and show accomplishments.
primary_functions: Explain the kennel’s history, mission, and breeding philosophy, including responsible placement of pet and show puppies
Summarize health testing standards, typical health clearances used, and commitments to fully tested breeding stock
Highlight notable show achievements, championships, and performance titles earned by kennel dogs
Provide links to key action pages such as Available Puppies, Planned Litters, Stud Dogs, and Show Schedule for users who want to engage further

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Available Puppies' call-to-action
Click 'View Planned Litters' call-to-action
Click 'Meet Our Stud Dogs' call-to-action
Click 'See Our Show Schedule' call-to-action

access_methods.description: Footer 'About' link
Links from Home page hero or summaries to About page

header_links.description: Browse currently available puppies with filters and sorting
View upcoming litters and join waitlists
Browse and compare kennel stud dogs available for breeding
Information and booking for kennel visits and tours
Handling workshops and other training events
Upcoming dog shows including those where kennel dogs are entered
View and manage your watchlist of tracked shows
Kennel store for apparel, leashes, and accessories
Contact form and kennel contact details

footer_links.description: Learn more about the kennel and breeding philosophy
See upcoming litters and waitlist options
View stud dog profiles and stud service information
Arrange a visit or tour of the kennel
Find and register for handling workshops and events
See upcoming dog shows and entries
Get in touch with the kennel
